specificity.description: A tiny thumb-polished brass elevator-call button token on a short vest watch chain, used as a subtle concierge habit and motion cue.

outfits.tokenVisibility: visible but tiny near waistcoat chain

poses.tokenAction: rests on the short vest chain with one small worn brass highlight
poses.promptAddOn: Otis stands at ease, one relaxed hand near the vest chain, token visible but clearly secondary to his warm face and slight belly.

poses.tokenAction: token remains still while his open hand welcomes the user
poses.promptAddOn: Otis greets with an open hand; the tiny brass call-button token hangs quietly from the waistcoat chain.

poses.tokenAction: one finger lightly touches the chain without hiding the hand
poses.promptAddOn: Otis listens with a gentle head tilt, one hand lightly touching the chain near the tiny token, realistic older fingers visible.

poses.tokenAction: thumb and forefinger gently rub the token as a small habit
poses.promptAddOn: Otis thinks quietly, thumb and forefinger rubbing the tiny brass elevator-call token, not magical or theatrical.

poses.tokenAction: token rests back against the vest while one hand explains
poses.promptAddOn: Otis talks with one open-hand gesture; the small token sits back against the vest chain.

poses.tokenAction: token partly tucked as posture straightens
poses.promptAddOn: Otis becomes attentive and calm, posture slightly straighter, token partly tucked and not stealing focus.

poses.tokenAction: token visible beside a restrained ledger or keycard
poses.promptAddOn: Otis works with a small ledger or keycard, the token visible beside the chain as a practical concierge detail.

outfits.tokenVisibility: mostly tucked beneath coat, tiny brass edge only

poses.tokenAction: mostly hidden under coat
poses.promptAddOn: The formal coat keeps the call-button token mostly hidden, preserving the premium silhouette.

poses.tokenAction: chain edge visible near coat opening
poses.promptAddOn: As Otis greets, only a short chain edge and tiny brass glint show near the coat opening.

poses.tokenAction: no active token gesture
poses.promptAddOn: Listening pose prioritizes face and hands; the token remains barely visible under the formal coat.

poses.tokenAction: one hand near coat front, not pulling token out fully
poses.promptAddOn: Otis thinks with one hand near the coat front, touching the hidden chain without turning the token into a focal prop.

poses.tokenAction: token hidden
poses.promptAddOn: Talking pose keeps the formal coat clean; the token is hidden or nearly hidden.

poses.tokenAction: token hidden
poses.promptAddOn: Alert pose stays formal and grounded; no prop emphasis.

poses.tokenAction: tiny chain edge next to ledger hand
poses.promptAddOn: Working pose may show a tiny chain edge as Otis checks a ledger, with full hands and props uncropped.

outfits.tokenVisibility: clearest version, still smaller than any keycard or hand

poses.tokenAction: rests against waistcoat below hand line
poses.promptAddOn: Working waistcoat shows the small call-button token most clearly, but it stays below hand line and secondary.

poses.tokenAction: chain shifts subtly with welcoming gesture
poses.promptAddOn: Greeting gesture creates a subtle chain shift, with no exaggerated swing.

poses.tokenAction: finger touches chain near token
poses.promptAddOn: Listening pose uses a gentle finger-on-chain habit, readable and calm at mobile scale.

poses.tokenAction: thumb rubs token
poses.promptAddOn: Thinking pose has the clearest thumb-rubbing-token gesture, but the prop must stay tiny and matte.

poses.tokenAction: token rests still
poses.promptAddOn: Talking pose keeps the token still while one hand explains, avoiding visual noise.

poses.tokenAction: hand moves away from token
poses.promptAddOn: Alert pose moves the hand away from the token to protect silhouette and urgency.

poses.tokenAction: token sits beside keycard or ledger, not overlapping fingers
poses.promptAddOn: Working pose includes token beside a restrained keycard or ledger, with clean hand anatomy and no overlaps.

expansionRule: Do not generate all 21 sprites until the identity reference plus the first four probes pass native source preflight, mobile readability, prop restraint, and hand/chain anatomy checks.
